data.title: dso:sprint skill does not run end-session at sprint conclusion
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Chronic issue: the /dso:sprint skill consistently fails to invoke /dso:end (end-session) at the conclusion of a sprint. This has been reported and partially addressed in multiple prior bugs and resolution attempts but has not been fully resolved. The skill should automatically run end-session cleanup (technical learnings, session summary, worktree validation) after Phase 9 (session close).

## Prior History
Multiple fix attempts across prior sessions — issue persists despite previous bug tickets and resolution attempts.
